programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard angers the university and the physics community when he gives an embarrassing radio interview; Bernadette and Amy compare their successes at work.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Amy records Sheldon talking in his sleep and tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new co-worker.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Howard and Bernadette are disappointed when they find out the sex of the baby. Leonard is annoyed when his mother befriends Penny.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Raj don't react well when Amy enlists Howard's help on a project. Penny discovers the secret to managing a high-maintenance genius.

programs.title: Becker
programs.desc: Becker's habit of not being very vocal unless he's on a rant is bothering Chris, who complains about his communication skills; Linda falls for a father and his son who are both named Steve; Hector's bid to invest in coffee futures goes unheeded.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: The Botched Language of Cranes: After publicly denouncing Seattle as a 'soggy' city, Frasier must battle the angry words and 'gifts' of die-hard Seattleites.
